docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WILTZ, THADDEUS AS TO DEFENDANT PADILLA, JESUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED APR-29-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PADILLA, JESUS
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-10-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-10-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILTZ, THADDEUS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PADILLA, JESUS $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,625.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILTZ, THADDEUS AS TO DEFENDANT PADILLA, JESUS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT PADILLA, JESUS HEARING SET FOR JUL-27-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILTZ, THADDEUS AS TO DEFENDANT PADILLA, JESUS

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-27-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $8,250.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PADILLA, JESUS
